text:
edwin       2007-09-24 05:18:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/mbmon       Makefile 
    sysutils/mbmon/files patch-sens_winbond.c 
  Log:
  [PATCH] sysutils/mbmon - enables recognition of 657DHG controller
  
          Enclosed one line patch enables mbmon's recognition of the 657DHG
          temp sensing device on the Asus P5x motherboard series
  
  PR:             ports/116474
  Submitted by:   Howard Goldstein <hg@queue.to>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.24      +1 -1      ports/sysutils/mbmon/Makefile
  1.4       +2 -1      ports/sysutils/mbmon/files/patch-sens_winbond.c
